clauses_identified.text: Each party agrees to maintain the confidentiality of all Confidential Information received from the other party and not to disclose it to third parties without prior written consent.
This Agreement shall continue for two (2) years from the date of execution. Either party may terminate upon thirty (30) days' written notice.
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of California.

summary_actual.summary: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement with 2-year term and 30-day termination notice. Standard confidentiality and return-of-information obligations.
key_obligations: Each party: Return or destroy information upon termination
key_rights: Either party can terminate with 30 days' notice

clauses_identified.text: Recipient agrees that any and all information disclosed by Discloser shall remain confidential in perpetuity and shall not be disclosed without written consent.
Discloser may terminate this Agreement at any time. Recipient may not terminate without 60 days' notice.

anomalies_actual.description: Termination rights are heavily one-sided: Discloser can exit anytime, but Recipient needs 60 days' notice.
anomalies_actual.evidence: Section 3: 'Discloser may terminate at any time. Recipient may not terminate without 60 days notice.'
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Negotiate mutual termination rights (e.g., both parties with 30 days' notice)

anomalies_actual.description: 'Perpetuity' confidentiality obligation has no time limit or exceptions. This is unusually broad.
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Negotiate a sunset clause (e.g., 5 years) or exceptions for independently developed information

summary_actual.summary: One-sided NDA where Discloser has unilateral termination rights and Recipient's obligations last indefinitely.
key_obligations: Recipient: Keep information confidential in perpetuity
Recipient: Requires 60 days' notice to exit

clauses_identified.text: Recipient shall not disclose Confidential Information except as required by law or court order, or with Discloser's prior written consent. Recipient may disclose to its employees, contractors, and advisors on a need-to-know basis.

summary_actual.summary: Unilateral NDA with carve-outs for legal requirements and advisors.
key_obligations: Recipient: Protect confidential info; may share with employees/advisors on need-to-know basis
key_rights: Recipient: Can disclose if legally required

clauses_identified.text: This Agreement automatically renews for successive one-year periods unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least 45 days before the renewal date.

anomalies_actual.description: Automatic renewal requires 45-day notice—an unusually tight window that could be missed.
anomalies_actual.evidence: Section 5: 'automatically renews...unless...45 days before renewal date'
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Negotiate a 60-90 day notice period or change to non-automatic renewal with mutual agreement required

summary_actual.summary: NDA with automatic annual renewal requiring 45-day non-renewal notice.
key_obligations: Parties: Provide 45 days' notice to prevent auto-renewal
key_rights: Either party: Can exit via 45-day non-renewal notice

clauses_identified.text: In the event of any breach of confidentiality, the Discloser shall be entitled to recover all damages, including consequential and punitive damages, without limitation.

anomalies_actual.description: No cap on liability; includes consequential and punitive damages.
anomalies_actual.evidence: Section 7: 'recover all damages, including consequential and punitive damages, without limitation'
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Negotiate a liability cap (e.g., total fees paid, or $500K) and exclude punitive damages

summary_actual.summary: NDA with unlimited liability exposure for breach, including consequential and punitive damages.
key_obligations: Recipient: Risk of unlimited liability for breach
key_rights: Discloser: Can seek all damages without cap

clauses_identified.text: Either party may terminate this SaaS Agreement for convenience upon ninety (90) days' written notice.
Provider's total liability shall not exceed the total fees paid in the preceding twelve (12) months.

summary_actual.summary: Standard SaaS agreement with 90-day termination notice and liability capped at 12 months' fees.
key_obligations: Provider: Deliver SaaS services per SLA
key_rights: Either party: Terminate with 90 days' notice

clauses_identified.text: Customer may only terminate for material breach by Provider. Provider may terminate upon 30 days' notice.

anomalies_actual.description: Provider has unilateral termination right with only 30 days' notice. Customer can only exit for material breach.
anomalies_actual.evidence: Section 8: 'Provider may terminate upon 30 days notice; Customer may only terminate for material breach'
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Negotiate mutual termination for convenience with equal notice periods (e.g., 90 days)

anomalies_actual.description: Auto-renewal with asymmetric exit rights; Customer trapped unless Provider breaches.
anomalies_actual.evidence: Section 8: Auto-renewal clause combined with one-sided termination
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Require explicit mutual consent for renewal or allow Customer to opt-out without penalty

summary_actual.summary: One-sided SaaS agreement: Provider can exit with 30 days' notice; Customer can only exit for material breach.
key_obligations: Customer: Pay fees even if terminated by Provider

clauses_identified.text: Customer agrees to pay the Service Fees in accordance with the pricing schedule. Late payments incur 5% monthly interest or the maximum rate allowed by law.

anomalies_actual.description: 5% monthly late fee compounds significantly and may exceed reasonable damages.
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Negotiate a flat fee (e.g., $500) or lower monthly rate (e.g., 1.5%)

summary_actual.summary: SaaS with punitive late payment fees of 5% monthly interest.
key_obligations: Customer: Pay fees; subject to 5% monthly interest if late

clauses_identified.text: All custom code, configurations, and work product developed by Provider under this Agreement shall be the exclusive property of Customer. Provider retains rights to its pre-existing tools and methodologies.

summary_actual.summary: Clear IP ownership: Custom work to Customer, pre-existing tools to Provider.
key_obligations: Provider: Transfer custom IP to Customer

clauses_identified.text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York. Any disputes shall be resolved by binding arbitration in New York County.

summary_actual.summary: Service agreement governed by New York law with mandatory arbitration.
key_obligations: Parties: Submit disputes to binding arbitration in NY

clauses_identified.text: Licensor grants Customer a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Software solely for Customer's internal business purposes.

summary_actual.summary: Non-exclusive software license restricted to internal use.

clauses_identified.text: Licensor provides no warranty of any kind, express or implied, including fitness for a particular purpose or non-infringement.

summary_actual.summary: License with full warranty disclaimer including non-infringement.

clauses_identified.text: This license may not be assigned, sublicensed, or transferred without Licensor's prior written consent.

summary_actual.summary: Non-assignable software license.

clauses_identified.text: Licensor may terminate this license immediately if Customer breaches any term. Customer has no termination right.

anomalies_actual.description: Licensor has immediate termination right; Customer has no exit option.
anomalies_actual.evidence: Section 6: 'Licensor may terminate immediately; Customer has no termination right'
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Negotiate Customer's right to terminate for convenience with notice period

anomalies_actual.description: 'Any breach' is a vague standard; should specify materiality threshold.
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Narrow to 'material breach' and require 30-day cure period

summary_actual.summary: One-sided license with Licensor's unilateral immediate termination right for any breach.
key_obligations: Customer: Avoid any breach or face immediate termination

clauses_identified.text: Customer indemnifies Licensor against all third-party claims arising out of Customer's use of the Software, including claims related to the Software's functionality.

anomalies_actual.description: Customer indemnifies Licensor for claims related to the Software's functionality—but Licensor controls the code.
anomalies_actual.evidence: Section 7: 'indemnifies...including claims related to Software's functionality'
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Narrow indemnity to Customer's use, data, and actions; exclude defects in Licensor's code

summary_actual.summary: License with overly broad indemnification from Customer to Licensor.
key_obligations: Customer: Indemnify Licensor for broad range of claims

clauses_identified.text: All work product, inventions, and intellectual property created by Employee during employment shall be the sole property of Employer.

summary_actual.summary: Employment agreement with employer ownership of all work product.
key_obligations: Employee: Assign all IP to Employer

clauses_identified.text: Employee agrees not to disclose or use any confidential business information during or after employment, in perpetuity.

anomalies_actual.description: Perpetual confidentiality obligation after employment ends is unusual and may be unenforceable.
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Negotiate a time limit (e.g., 3-5 years after termination)

summary_actual.summary: Employment agreement with perpetual post-employment confidentiality obligation.

clauses_identified.text: Employee acknowledges that Employer may modify compensation, benefits, or job duties at any time without notice or consent.

summary_actual.summary: Employment agreement with unilateral employer right to modify terms.

clauses_identified.text: Employment is at-will and may be terminated by Employer without cause or notice. Employee must provide 30 days' notice to resign.

anomalies_actual.description: At-will employment with asymmetric notice: Employer terminates at-will; Employee needs 30 days' notice.
anomalies_actual.evidence: Section 8: 'Employer...without cause or notice. Employee...30 days' notice'
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Negotiate mutual notice period (e.g., 30 days for both) or severance

summary_actual.summary: At-will employment heavily favoring Employer with asymmetric termination.

clauses_identified.text: Employee waives all claims against Employer for any reason, including discrimination, harassment, wage violations, and wrongful termination.

anomalies_actual.description: Blanket waiver of legal claims may be unenforceable and exposes Employee to significant liability.
anomalies_actual.recommendation: Consult employment attorney; this clause may be void in many jurisdictions

summary_actual.summary: Employment agreement with unenforceable blanket waiver of all legal claims.

clauses_identified.text: Net 30 payment terms. 2% early payment discount if paid within 10 days.

summary_actual.summary: Supply agreement with Net 30 payment terms.

clauses_identified.text: Net 45 payment terms. 2% early payment discount if paid within 10 days.

clauses_identified.text: Net 30 payment terms. 2% early payment discount if paid within 10 days.

summary_actual.summary: Supply agreement with Net 30 payment terms.

key_obligations: Provider: Monitor and respond within 4 hours
